arts.ttl: What was Vincent Kompany’s game-changing adjustment after Barcelona beatdown?
arts.sum: When Bayern Munich got thumped 4-1 by FC Barcelona in the Champions League, it woke up something inside of Vincent Kompany. Last month’s defeat against Barcelona was a learning process for Vincent Kompany.

Amid the transfer exit rumors, a former Manchester United coach believes the Englishmen shouldn’t be sold. Last month, TEAMtalk revealed that Paris Saint-Germain had reignited their interest in Rashford. arts.ttl: Dayot Upamecano stresses importance of Bayern Munich getting a result vs PSG
arts.sum: With PSG in Europe being the first hurdle to clear of this difficult stretch for Bayern, center back Dayot Upamecano, who’s partnership with Kim min-Jae continues to get more and more solid this season, stressed the importance of needing a result against the reigning Ligue 1 champions, who have also struggled in Europe this season. If you only looked at current form, it would be rather difficult to guess that Bayern Munich had lost to both Aston Villa and Barcelona in the Champions League earlier in the season, but that is a matter a fact despite how high they are currently flying.

arts.ttl: PSG in 'difficult' spot against heavyweights Bayern
arts.sum: PSG manager Luis Enrique said on Monday that his team have put themselves in a "difficult" spot with a slow start to their Champions League campaign.
